overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character ascending a neon-lit stairwell and emerging into a rainy, futuristic city at night. The character explores the bustling urban environment with towering skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and flying vehicles while walking through crowded streets wet with rain reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit concrete stairwell with graffiti art

agents.ego_description: walking up a staircase illuminated by red neon lights embedded in the steps

entered.detail: large graffiti artwork of a motorcycle racer on concrete wall
concrete stairs with bright red neon tube lighting along each step edge
rough textured gray concrete wall with graffiti

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow concrete stairwell illuminated by vibrant red neon lights. A large motorcycle graffiti mural decorates the left wall as the character climbs toward the street level exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy cyberpunk city street with holographic advertisements

events.description: exits the covered stairwell into the open rainy city street

agents.ego_description: emerging from the stairwell onto the wet pavement and looking around the neon-lit street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the building entrance holding an umbrella

entered.detail: rain-soaked asphalt reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
large glowing advertisements and corporate signage on building facades
large teal neon sign reading 'softsys' on distant building

segments.scene_description: The character exits the stairwell into a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night. Neon billboards and the prominent 'softsys' sign illuminate the wet pavement as the character steps onto the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with towering skyscrapers and flying traffic

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers and flying vehicles overhead

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the massive skyscrapers and flying cars passing between buildings

entered.detail: massive futuristic tower with illuminated windows and structural details
elevated walkway connecting two high-rise buildings
futuristic car flying between the skyscrapers above the street

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to showcase the vertical scale of the cyberpunk city. Flying vehicles navigate between massive skyscrapers connected by skybridges, while neon advertisements glow against the rainy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with commercial storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the crowded sidewalk past other pedestrians and street vendors

notable_agents.action: street vendor with glowing pink neon umbrella selling goods

entered.detail: metal barrier separating pedestrian walkway from street traffic
bright pink glowing umbrella sheltering a street vendor

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a busy downtown sidewalk lined with railings and street vendors. The massive 'softsys' sign looms ahead while pedestrians with umbrellas navigate the wet pavement, and traffic flows along the adjacent street.

events.description: character steps onto illuminated crosswalk stripes to cross the busy intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection following the illuminated crosswalk path toward the softsys building

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing with glowing blue accents
wide open intersection with multiple crossing paths and traffic signals

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide illuminated intersection, navigating between moving traffic. The crosswalk stripes glow with blue light on the wet pavement as the character approaches the massive softsys building entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a neon-lit stairwell into the expansive, rain-drenched verticality of a futuristic metropolis. It begins with the character ascending narrow concrete stairs past a motorcycle graffiti mural under a vibrant red glow before emerging onto a wet sidewalk illuminated by glowing billboards. As the character steps into the city, the camera tilts upward to reveal a towering skyline of skyscrapers, skybridges, and flying vehicles navigating the rainy night sky. The perspective then shifts back to the street level, following the character past railings and vendors toward a looming softsys sign. Finally, the movement carries the character across a wide intersection where blue-lit crosswalks glow on the pavement, leading directly toward the massive entrance of the softsys building.
